$source: WCG SD Asset Management — re-authored 2026-07-05 from (a) the live AssetManagement app theme (navy #1A3E6F, Segoe UI, #eef1f5 canvas, set 2026-07-02), (b) tokens measured off the served Claude prototype 'Asset Management System (standalone).html' (its teal brand #0D685A is REPLACED by WCG navy per user directive — keep the app theme, take the design's structure/neutrals/anatomy).
$description: Navy (#1A3E6F) anchors every interactive affordance (buttons, links, code text, action icons, rail selection); the canvas is cool grey #EEF1F5; surfaces are flat white cards with 1px #E5E7EB borders and 8px radius — structure by hairline, not shadow. Tables: 42px #FAFAFA header band with 11px/600 uppercase 0.44px-tracked labels, 48px rows, #F5F5F5 hairlines, 18px horizontal padding. Status is a soft tinted pill chip (10px/600 uppercase, 11px radius, 5px dot). Monospace for codes/amounts.
$weightPolicy: 400/600 binary (Segoe UI). 600 for headings, labels, primary cells, chips; 400 for body/values. 700 reserved for the page title only.

accent.$use: sidebar/header chrome + selected rail item tint base. Same hue as brand.primary in this brand.

surfaces.$measured: prototype: table header band #FAFAFA, modal footer band #FAFAFA, canvas #F0F2F5 (we keep the app's existing #EEF1F5)

lines.$measured: card border #E5E7EB · input border #D6D6D6 · header-row underline #F0F0F0 · data-row hairline #F5F5F5

semantic.$measured: info callout measured off the prototype modal (bg #EEF4FB, border #D6E4F5, text #3442D7 @12px). Success tones keep the prototype's soft green-tint chip (bg #E8F2EF) with a green-teal fg so 'Active' still reads green under the navy brand.

type.family: "Segoe UI", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Roboto, "Noto Sans", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
type.familyMono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace
type.$fontPolicy: Segoe UI leads (WCG/government Windows estate); prototype used Inter — do not load web fonts.
type.$measured: page h1 24/600 #1F1F1F + 13px #6B7280 subtitle · section h2 18/600 · table header 11/600 uppercase ls 0.44px #4A4A4A · primary cell 13/600 #1F1F1F · secondary cell 13/400 #4A4A4A · code cell mono 12/600 brand-coloured · contact cell mono 12.5 #6B7280 · chip 10/600 uppercase · rail item 13.5/600 + 11.5 desc · modal field label 13/600 mb 6px

radius.$measured: cards/table wrap/GRAP strip 8 · buttons/inputs 4 · rail items 6 · status chip 11 (fixed, not 9999) · icon action buttons 4

shadow.$philosophy: Border-forward, flat. The prototype's cards and table wraps carry NO shadow — 1px #E5E7EB borders only. Reserve `overlay` for modals.

chrome.$measured: Configuration screen: sub-nav rail card 248px wide (white, 8px radius, 1px #E5E7EB, 8px inner padding), 24px gap to the content column (rail x=88 w=248, content x=360).

controls.$measured: primary Add button 36px/radius-4/600 with plus glyph · inputs 38px radius 4 border #D6D6D6 pad 0 11px · row action icon buttons 28×28 transparent, brand-coloured glyphs (pencil, power) · GRAP threshold strip 68px, tinted brand card (in the prototype teal-tinted #F3F8F6/#DCEBE6 → WCG uses brand tintSoft #F3F6FA border #D9E2EE), 38px radius-8 brand icon box, mono right-aligned 120px input with 'R' prefix outside

statusLifecycle.$reflist: Shesha.AssetManagement ActiveDisabled-style reflists (CostCentre.status, Supplier.supplierStatus, DepreciationRule.status: 1 Active / 2 Disabled). Chip anatomy measured off the prototype: inline-flex pill, gap 5px, padding 3px 9px, radius 11, font 10/600 uppercase ls 0.03em, leading 5px dot in the fg-dot colour.

roles.$note: codeText/actionIcon: the prototype renders entity codes (CC-1001), rate figures and the row action glyphs in the BRAND colour — under WCG that is navy. Headings are ink, never brand.

$antdTheme.$use: Already applied to the app on 2026-07-02 (Shesha.ThemeSettings: navy primary, light sidebar, #EEF1F5 layout bg). Do NOT re-push at app level for this phase; listed for reference and per-component recipes.

token.fontFamily: "Segoe UI", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Roboto, "Noto Sans", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
token.fontFamilyCode: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace
